CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, '🦆'), (2, 'Hello, World!'), (3, NULL), (4, 'DuckDB');
SELECT id, sha256(value) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, sha256(value) AS hash_value FROM test_table ORDER BY id DESC;
SELECT id, sha256(CONCAT(value, ' - ', id)) FROM test_table;
SELECT t.id, t.value, (SELECT sha256(t.value) WHERE t.id = test_table.id) AS hash_value FROM test_table t;
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INT, ref_value VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO another_table VALUES (1, 'Reference Text'), (2, 'Sample Value');
SELECT t.id, t.value, a.ref_value, sha256(CONCAT(t.value, a.ref_value)) AS combined_hash FROM test_table t JOIN another_table a ON t.id = a.ref_id;
WITH temp AS (SELECT id, sha256(value) AS hash_value FROM test_table) SELECT * FROM temp WHERE hash_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE sha256(value) IS NOT NULL;
